case_title: THE RITZ-CARLTON, SAN FRANCISCO vs. KORCZNSKI, RICHARD IND&DEBA DIGITECH COMMUNICATION et al

docket_entries.description: AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $173.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT KORCZNSKI, RICHARD IND&DEBA DIGITECH COMMUNICATION DIGITECH COMMUNICATIONS
